Admissions Open : DAE Civil, Electrical, Mechanical Pharmacy Technician (Category-B)

schedule
 

Message By Chairperson

As the chairperson of Lahore Group of Technical and Allied Health Sciences Institutions, I am delighted to introduce you to our vibrant community dedicated to excellence in technical education and innovation.

At Lahore Group of Techanical and Allied Health Sciences, we believe that education is not just about acquiring knowledge but about fostering a passion for discovery and creativity. Our state-of-the-art facilities, experienced faculty, and comprehensive curriculum are designed to prepare you for the challenges and opportunities of the future.

We take pride in our strong connections with industry leaders, providing you with invaluable hands-on experience and real-world insights. Our commitment to your success extends beyond the classroom, as we offer a supportive environment where collaboration and exploration thrive.

Choosing the right institute is a significant decision, and we are here to guide you every step of the way. We invite you to join us in shaping the future of technology and making a meaningful impact in the world.

Thank you for considering group. We look forward to welcoming you into our community!

Warm regards,

Rana Muhammad Arshad
Chairperson

PROGRAMS BEING OFFERED BY GROUP

TECHNICAL PROGRAMS

3-Years Diploma of Associate Engineers

The Diploma of Associate Engineer (DAE) in Pakistan is a technical qualification awarded to students who complete a three-year program after completing their secondary education (Matriculation). It focuses on practical and theoretical knowledge in various engineering fields such as Civil, Electrical, Mechanical Technologies etc.

CIVIL TECHNOLOGY

refers to the application of engineering principles and techniques to the planning, design, construction, maintenance of infrastructure. Deals with the behavior of earth materials & the design of foundations, retaining structures and slopes.

ELECTRICAL TECHNOLOGY

provides the opportunity to acquire the theory and skills needed to gain entry-level employment and advancement at an accelerated pace in the electrical field. Students will be able to apply basic electrical theory to all aspects of electrical technology.

MECHANICAL TECHNOLOGY

is a branch of engineering that focuses on the design, analysis, manufacturing, and maintenance of mechanical systems. It combines principles from physics and materials science to create devices and machinery used in various industries.

ALLIED HEALTH SCIENCES

2 Years PHARMACY TECHNICIAN (Category-B)

A Pharmacy Technician course is a foundational educational program designed to train/prepares individuals to become pharmacy technicians and a career in the health care industry. This course provide the knowledge and skills necessary to perform tasks related to medication dispensing, inventory management, patient care, and pharmacy operations under the supervision of a licensed medical store. Upon completing the course, many students choose to become certified, which enhances job prospects and career advancement. Pharmacy technician courses typically cover both theoretical and practical aspects of the profession.

LAHORE GROUP OF TECHNICAL

& Allied Health Sciences
